response.original_title: チャイルドフェイスガード
response.overview: Akari Takeshita (28), recently divorced, comes to the ballet studio run by her father, Junichi Takeshita (52). Junichi finds Akari a nuisance. Akari receives a spare key and ends up living at the ballet studio. As Junichi is leaving, he invites Akari to a restaurant for her birthday. Akari is delighted by the invitation. Akari has a past of being abused by Junichi. Because of this, she repeatedly puts on a child's leotard and suffocates herself to derive pleasure from it. One day, Natsuki Imai (25), a former student of Junichi, comes to the studio. Junichi is happy to see his student again. Akari is jealous of Natsuki and tries to get Junichi's attention by speaking ill of her. On the night of her birthday, Akari waits for Junichi at the studio, but he doesn't come. Akari gets tired of waiting and falls asleep. When she woke up, Junichi and Natsuki were happily drinking alcohol. Then Junichi found a child's leotard in Akari's belongings...
response.title: チャイルドフェイスガード
